message:
fix(test): resolve flaky rate_limiter_high_rpm_rapid_refill f64 precision

The test used t0 + 0.01 as the exact refill boundary for 100 tokens/sec,
but (1000.0 + 0.01) - 1000.0 loses precision in f64 arithmetic, making
elapsed * rate_per_sec land slightly below 1.0 instead of exactly 1.0.

Use t0 + 0.011 (10% margin above the boundary) to avoid f64 edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
